description: Well Monitoring Report (WMR) Business Logic Formulas

formulas.column_name: Project Tie in port readiness (140 days before spud date)
formulas.logic: Days between Tie-in readiness date and Rig On date

columns_from_wmr.AW: date of tie in port readiness

formulas.column_name: Location Pegged (Actual Pegged to SPUD /Tentative Rig on date) Target above 140 days
formulas.logic: Days between rig on date and pegged/target date

formulas.column_name: Stable Rig Sequence (Actual Rig on date to SCR Date) Target above 90 days
formulas.logic: Days between Rig On date and SCR date

formulas.column_name: FLAF issued (FLAF to SPUD /Tentative Rig On date) Target above 90 days
formulas.logic: Days between FLAF issue date and Rig On date

formulas.column_name: Issue of Survey report With in 15 days from FLAF
formulas.logic: Days between FLAF issue date and site survey report issuance date

columns_from_wmr.AK: date of site survey report issuance

formulas.column_name: Overall Commissioning Duration (after Rig Off)- Target 5 days With (Rig/FBU/RSR) completion and 15 days with Hoist completion
formulas.logic: Days between Rig Off date and commissioning finish date

columns_from_wmr.BU: actual comm finish date with in 2 days from actual engg completion date

column_mappings.actual_rig_on_date: Date rig arrived at well location (Spud)
column_mappings.actual_rig_off_date: Date rig departed from well location
column_mappings.date_of_site_survey_report_issuance: Date site survey report was issued
